title: 冬季防静电四招实用指南
author: ミチコ　/大人着回しスタイリスト
prompt: 由于许多客户都饱受静电困扰，我翻出了之前制作的一张图。使用 NanoBanana Pro 制作。原图是一个男孩，但我为了方便可视化，将其改成了女性。
prompt_en:
静電気で悩んでるお客様が多いので前に作った図解を引っぱり出してきました
NanoBanana Proで作成
最初は男の子だったけど、やっぱり女性の方がイメージしやすくて変更◎

title: 一框六格·风格女王
author: @Mind_Boticni
prompt: 超逼真的电影级肖像，一位美丽女性身着六套风格迥异的时尚服饰，呈现在同一画面中——街头风、波西米亚风、赛博朋克风、奢华晚礼服、商务风、未来主义盔甲。每个姿势都自信而充满活力，采用专业影棚灯光、极致细腻的肌肤质感、Vogue杂志大片风格、纯AI美学，8K高清呈现。
prompt_en: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a beautiful woman in 6 different stylish outfits in one frame, each outfit completely unique — streetwear, boho, cyberpunk, luxury evening gown, business chic, futuristic armor. Each pose confident and dynamic, studio lighting, ultra-detailed skin, Vogue editorial style, pure AI aesthetic, 8K re

title: 纳米香蕉Pro实现“剪刀大叔”形象：拼装模型与毛绒质感人偶双
author: ハサミおじさん♪北海道のまちゼミ好きな二代目理容師
prompt: 使用 nano banana pro 可视化“{"character" "Scissor Man"}”！✂️ 我为塑料模型风格和毛绒植绒手办风格各创建了两种图案。
prompt_en: nano banana proで「{"キャラクター" "ハサミおじさん"}」を具現化！✂️プラモデル風と、モフモフなフロッキー加工フィギュアをそれぞれ2パターン制作しました。

title: 哥特风自拍镜中魅影
author: Lex

title: 粉色滚轴鞋悬垂滴落，拼贴背景复古潮流艺术
author: Heather Green
prompt: 一幅高分辨率、超精细的图像，采用自定义样式 #layeredlayout。场景描绘了日落时分的未来城市景观，霓虹灯倒映在湿漉漉的人行道上。前景中，一个身着赛博朋克服装的孤独身影在绚丽的天空下形成剪影。图像利用多个重叠的视觉平面来营造深度和复杂性，这是分层布局风格的典型特征。电影级光照，8k，超现实主义。
prompt_en: A high-resolution, ultra-detailed image using the custom style #layeredlayout. The scene depicts a futuristic cityscape at sunset, with neon lights reflecting off wet pavement. In the foreground, a lone figure in cyberpunk attire stands silhouetted against the vibrant sky. The image utilizes multiple overlapping visual planes to create depth and complexity, typical of the layered layout style. Cinematic lighting, 8k, photorealistic.

title: 夜景少女温柔写真，复古格纹裙装搭配柔和妆容
author: Zara
prompt: { "composition": { "framing": "垂直肖像构图", "shot_type": "中景，从腰部到头部", "camera_angle": "与视线齐平，略微向右倾斜", "subject_position": "画面右中", "pose": "四分之三侧面，面向左侧，头部转向镜头", "negative_space": "大片黑暗天空占据画面上半部分", "depth_of_field": "景深从浅到中等，主体清晰对焦，背景柔和模糊" }, "subject": { "type": "女性形象主体", "age_appearance": "年轻成人", "expression": "柔和、平静、略带好奇", "gaze": "与镜头直接眼神交流", "skin_tone": "白皙，带暖色调", "facial_features": { "eyes": "大而深棕色，对比度增强", "cheeks": "腮红明显，呈玫瑰色", "lips": "柔和的红粉色，哑光质地", "nose": "自然形状，带有微妙高光" }, "hair": { "color": "深棕色", "style": "凌乱的盘发，有几缕发丝散落在脸旁", "texture": "光滑，略带飞发" } }, "wardrobe": { "outfit_type": "连衣裙搭配叠穿衬衫", "dress": { "pattern": "格子", "colors": ["柔和粉", "米色", "灰色"], "fit": "修身胸衣" }, "blouse": { "color": "米白色", "fabric": "轻薄，半透明", "sleeves": "短泡泡袖，带有柔软的荷叶边下摆" }, "style_influence": "柔和复古 / 田园风美学" }, "lighting": { "primary_light": "机顶闪光灯", "light_quality": "硬朗的正面光", "direction": "正面，略高于视线", "effect_on_subject": "面部和躯干被明亮照亮，边缘清晰", "background_lighting": "环境城市灯光和室内灯光", "shadow_behavior": "面部阴影极少，主体后方略有衰减" }, "color_palette": { "dominant_colors": ["黑色", "柔和粉", "奶油色", "暖米色"], "accent_colors": ["暖黄色灯光", "冷蓝色窗户光"], "overall_tone": "暖色调主体衬托冷暗背景" }, "background": { "environment": "夜间室外住宅区", "elements": [ "前景阳台栏杆", "房屋和建筑", "带有暖色室内灯光的窗户", "漆黑的夜空" ], "setting_mood": "宁静、亲密的夜晚氛围" }, "artistic_style": { "aesthetic": "柔光夜间肖像", "mood": "浪漫、温柔、略带梦幻", "influences": ["社交媒体肖像摄影", "现代田园风"], "retouching_style": "以美颜为主，强调皮肤平滑度和腮红" }, "technical_details": { "camera_type_assumption": "智能手机相机", "lens_equivalent": "广角到标准（等效 24–35mm）", "flash_usage": "已启用", "iso_appearance": "低到中等，噪点极少", "sharpness": "主体清晰度高，背景降低", "contrast": "中等，高光提升" }, "post_processing": { "skin_smoothing": "中等", "color_grading": "暖色高光，中性阴影", "blush_enhancement": "强", "eye_enhancement": "微妙的亮度和对比度增加" }

title: 蓝莓装饰的珍珠奶茶罐装饮品商业摄影预设
author: Sharon Riley

title: 室内手绘草图变效果图
author: leaderai
prompt: 将这张手绘草图变成精美的渲染图，会所接待区域设计，线性灯光，柔和的氛围，照片级质感

title: 品牌产品数字广告
author: @shushant_l
prompt: 一个超现实的、超详细的 3D 数字广告，展示百事罐在中心爆裂，喷出清凉的碳酸可乐，气泡和冰块飞溅。罐子的金属表面具有锐利的、写实的纹理，包括冷凝水滴、光线反射和细微的划痕。场景周围是冷的透明冰片和柠檬皮在空中飞舞，增添了鲜明的对比。背景是深电光渐变，带有电影级体积照明和柔和的镜头光晕。绿色薄荷叶和雾气增添了清凉的自然点缀。整个场景使用高级全局光照、HDR 照明和真实的阴影在 4K UHD 下渲染。构图以高端饮料广告的戏剧性基调呈现，使用 Unreal Engine + Octane Render 等工具以达到最大的视觉冲击力。
prompt_en: A hyper-realistic, ultra-detailed 3D digital advertisement showcasing a Pepsi can bursting open at its center, sending a refreshing splash of carbonated cola into the air, with effervescent bubbles and ice cubes flying outward. The can’s metallic surface is rendered with sharp, photorealistic textures, complete with condensation droplets, light reflections, and subtle scratches. Surrounding the scene are cold, translucent ice shards and a twist of lemon zest caught mid-motion, adding a vibrant contrast. The background features a deep electric blue gradient with cinematic volumetric lighting and soft lens flares. Green mint leaves and misty vapors add a refreshing, natural accent. The entire scene is rendered in 4K UHD using advanced global illumination, HDR lighting, and realistic shadows. The composition evokes premium beverage advertising with a dramatic tone, created using tools like Unreal Engine + Octane Render for maximum visual impact.

title: 追逐多云的天空与野花梦境
author: ShreyaYadav___
prompt: 追逐多云的天空和野花的梦想。 ✨试试Gemini ai Nano香蕉提示⤵️{图像生成_提示主题躺在野花丛中的年轻女子服装飘逸的白色上衣环境郁郁葱葱的青草，娇嫩的花朵，多云的天空照明柔和、漫射的灯光，忧郁而宁静的氛围风格电影、柔焦、自然美、时尚和编辑摄影full_prompt_text一个宁静的场景，一个年轻女子躺在一片野花丛中，穿着一件飘逸的白色衬衫，与郁郁葱葱的绿草形成鲜明对比。她富有表现力的目光传达了深刻的思想，周围环绕着精致的花朵，增强了宁静的氛围。多云的天空投下柔和的漫射光，营造出一种忧郁而宁静的氛围。以电影风格捕捉柔焦和自然美的精髓，让人联想到时尚和编辑摄影。--ar 3:4--q 2--v 5参数方面比率3:4质量2.版本5.},元数据签名Shreya Yadav情绪宁静类别编辑肖像}}}
prompt_en:
Chasing cloudy skies and wildflower dreams. ✨
Try with Gemini ai Nano Banana
Prompt ⤵️
{
image_generation_prompt
subject
Young woman lying amidst a field of wildflowers
apparel
Flowing white blouse
environment
Lush green grass, delicate blooms, cloudy sky
lighting
Soft, diffused lighting, moody yet peaceful ambiance
style
Cinematic, soft focus, natural beauty, fashion and editorial photography
full_prompt_text
A tranquil scene featuring a young woman lying amidst a field of wildflowers, wearing a flowing white blouse that contrasts with the lush green grass. Her expressive gaze conveys deep thoughts, surrounded by delicate blooms that enhance the serene atmosphere. The cloudy sky cast soft, diffused lighting, creating a moody yet peaceful ambiance. Capture the essence of soft focus and natural beauty in a cinematic style, reminiscent of fashion and editorial photography. --ar 3:4 --q 2 --v 5

title: 角色设定图：无名兽人男性，二十多岁，190cm，犬系性格
author: dandoo
prompt: Nano Banana 的角色卡提示
prompt_en: Nano Banana 向けのキャラシートプロンプト

title: 冰晶奢护悬浮大片
author: @firatbilal
prompt: 超现实奢华护肤品产品拍摄，随机化妆品容器设计作为清晰的主角对象，以轻微对角倾斜悬浮于中心。大量中等到大型晶莹剔透的冰块从四面八方完全包围并包裹产品，填满整个画面边缘，营造密集的冰冻环境。冰块在深度上重叠，视觉上向产品挤压，但不形成底座或基台。高调的苍白冰蓝色、接近白色的背景，强烈的冷逆光与顶光产生锐利的高光、折射和玻璃般透明感。产品保持最清晰的焦点，冰块略柔和，可见冷凝水珠，极致细节，高端化妆品广告摄影，冷科技美学，照片级真实感。
prompt_en: Hyper-realistic luxury skincare product shot with a random cosmetic container design as the clear hero object, floating at the center with a slight diagonal tilt. Numerous medium-to-large crystal-clear ice blocks fully surround and wrap the product from all directions, filling the frame edge to edge, creating a dense frozen environment. The ice pieces overlap in depth, pressing visually toward the product without forming a base or pedestal. High-key pale icy blue, near-white background, strong cool backlighting and top lighting producing sharp highlights, refractions, and glassy transparency. The product remains the sharpest focal point, ice slightly softer, visible cold condensation droplets, ultra-detailed, premium cosmetic advertising photography, cold tech aesthetic, photorealistic.

title: 冰蓝玉质中式楼阁艺术摆件设计
author: Latte
prompt: 一个高度精细、制作精美的概念产品风格静物，描绘了一座优雅的传统中式凉亭，呈现为微型建筑艺术品。凉亭是一个三层宝塔结构，由半透明的玉石般和柔和磨砂的玻璃材料制成，色调为精致的乳白色和冰蓝色。半透明的青绿色玻璃屋顶具有精致的锥形轮廓，点缀着精细的香槟金色装饰边缘和复杂、优雅的金色飞檐细节。温暖、微妙的金色光芒透过凉亭的半透明窗户柔和地从内部散发出来，营造出柔和的内在光辉。一块小巧的垂直蓝金色牌匾精确地嵌入上层立面，低调而精致。凉亭矗立在一个简化、光滑的雕塑底座上，该底座灵感来源于程式化的山脉和平静的水面，由半透明的冰蓝色水晶材料雕刻而成。山水造型由优雅流畅的轮廓、柔和圆润的过渡和连续的雕塑表面定义，纹理内敛，没有尖锐的棱角，唤起精细抛光的玉石、融化的玻璃或宁静的冰冻波浪的感觉。山水底座完全填满画框底部，并被图像边缘干净地裁剪：没有可见的地面、平台、地平线，也没有空的底部空间。造型显得自然沉浸和连续，延伸到画框之外，而不是停留在其上。一道干净的白色玉石楼梯从雕塑底座内向上方凉亭入口处对角线无缝升起，保持清晰、平衡和优雅的渐进感。构图紧凑、精致且沉浸式：凉亭及其底座占据了画框的大部分，山水结构轻轻地压在下边缘，消除了视觉上的空虚，同时保持了宁静。相机：微妙的低角度，3/4 视角（大约旋转 25–30 度），近距离取景以强调精细的材质质量、精致的工艺和雕塑的精确性。柔和、漫射的奢华影棚灯光，硬阴影极少。高写实度，浅景深。干净的白色到浅灰色渐变背景仅限于上方区域，负空间经过精心控制。平静、空灵、精致、高级工艺、宁静而神圣的氛围，东方幻想与现代极简主义的结合。
prompt_en: A highly detailed, exquisitely crafted conceptual product-style still life of an elegant traditional Chinese pavilion, presented as a miniature architectural artwork.  The pavilion is a three-tiered pagoda structure made of semi-transparent jade-like and softly frosted glass material in refined milky white and ice-blue tones. Translucent turquoise-blue glass roofs feature delicately tapered profiles, accented with finely detailed champagne-gold ornamental edges and intricate, graceful golden flying-eave details.  A warm, subtle golden light glows gently from within the pavilion through translucent windows, creating a soft inner radiance. A small vertical blue-and-gold plaque is precisely embedded on the upper tier façade, understated yet refined.  The pavilion stands on a simplified, smooth sculptural base inspired by stylized mountains and calm water, carved from semi-transparent ice-blue crystal material. The mountain–water form is defined by elegant flowing contours, softly rounded transitions, and continuous sculptural surfaces, with restrained texture and no sharp ridges, evoking the feeling of finely polished jade, melted glass, or serene frozen waves.  The mountain–water base fully fills the bottom of the frame and is cleanly cropped by the image edge: there is no visible ground, no platform, no horizon line, and no empty bottom space. The form appears naturally immersed and continuous, extending beyond the frame rather than resting upon it.  A clean white jade staircase rises diagonally and seamlessly from within the sculptural base toward the pavilion entrance, maintaining clarity, balance, and an elegant sense of progression.  Composition is tight, refined, and immersive: the pavilion and its base occupy most of the frame, with the mountain–water structure gently pressing against the lower edge, eliminating visual emptiness while preserving calmness.  Camera: subtle low-angle, 3/4 perspective (approximately 25–30 degrees turned), with close framing to emphasize fine material quality, delicate craftsmanship, and sculptural precision.  Soft, diffused luxury studio lighting with minimal hard shadows. High realism, shallow depth of field. Clean white to light-gray gradient background confined to the upper area, with carefully restrained negative space. Calm, ethereal, refined, premium craftsmanship, serene and sacred atmosphere, Eastern fantasy meets modern minimalism.

title: 哥特式电影风格的肖像画
author: @YaseenK7212

title: 红发少女图书馆写生特写
author: Alev Kaya

title: 手绘风格的信息图卡片
author: Unknown
prompt:
创作一张手绘风格的信息图卡片，比例为9:16竖版。卡片主题鲜明，背景为带有纸质肌理的米色或米白色，整体设计体现质朴、亲切的手绘美感。 卡片上方以红黑相间、对比鲜明的大号毛笔草书字体突出标题，吸引视觉焦点。文字内容均采用中文草书，整体布局分为2至4个清晰的小节，每节以简短、精炼的中文短语表达核心要点。字体保持草书流畅的韵律感，既清晰可读又富有艺术气息。 卡片中点缀简单、有趣的手绘插画或图标，例如人物或象征符号，以增强视觉吸引力，引发读者思考与共鸣。 整体布局注意视觉平衡，预留足够的空白空间，确保画面简洁明了，易于阅读和理解。 
「认知」决定上限 「圈子」决定机会
- 你赚不到「认知」以外的钱， - 也遇不到「圈子」以外的机会。

title: 情侣草坪欢笑拥抱抓拍写真
author: Özge Döner

title: 90年代街头风少女坐姿肖像，像素涂鸦背景
author: Sharon Riley
prompt: 阳光下，一位时尚的西方年轻女性随意地坐在混凝土人行道上，身后的金属车库门紧闭，上面有复古的《街头霸王 2》风格涂鸦。她穿着一件亮黄色宽松衬衫，搭配多层银色项链、带有磨损图案补丁的宽松牛仔裤和黄白相间的运动鞋。她戴着复古 90 年代耳机，表情平静而自信。柔和的自然光线带着微妙的光晕，营造出电影般的都市时尚氛围，略微高角度拍摄，肤色真实，细节纹理丰富。
prompt_en: Sunlit urban streetwear portrait of a stylish young western woman sitting casually on a concrete sidewalk in front of a closed metal garage door with retro Street Fighter 2 inspired graffiti. SHe wears a bright yellow oversized shirt with layered silver chains, baggy jeans with worn graphic patches, and yellow white sneakers. Vintage 90s headphones on, calm and confident expression. Soft natural light with subtle glow, cinematic urban editorial mood, slightly high angle, realistic skin tones, textured details.

title: 漫画中的人物走出画面
author: @94vanAI
prompt: 在超写实 8K 场景中，照片中的人物走出画面，打破了摊开在美学风格卧室地板上的巨型日文版漫画《{就是玩 AI}》的分镜画框。该漫画页面呈现超现实风格的 4 格黑白日文漫画，带有网点纸、粗重墨线和正宗日式排版（从右至左阅读）。根据《{就是玩 AI}》的内容和角色设计，漫画中呈现的是同一人物的漫画形象，其穿着、造型
prompt_en: In the ultra-realistic 8K scene, the person in the photo walked out and broke the panel frame of a giant open Japanese version of the comic book called "｛就是玩AI}" lying on the floor of the aesthetic bedroom. The comic page depicts a surreal 4-panel Japanese version of the black-and-white comic, with screen tone, bold ink lines and authentic Japanese layout (read from right to left). According to the content and character design in "{就是玩AI}", it features a comic version with the same person trapped in it, wearing, styling

title: 蓝调街头风时尚大片，融合插画元素
author: 摆烂程序媛

title: 校园偶像拍立得写真预设
author: cheese_ai07
prompt:
请使用附件中的图片。
该图片中的角色名为“〇〇”。
生成的图片应完全保留附件中角色的发型、服装和风格，并展示一张放在桌子上的“instax mini（Check卡）”。
【关于图片格式的说明】：
整个图片应为纵向长方形（比例为86毫米高×54毫米宽）。
照片被白色边框所环绕，其中上、左、右三边的边框较窄，只有下边的边框较宽。
prompt_en:
gemini3のnano banana proを使って
チェキのプロンプトを作りました☺️
写真渡して、プロンプトを送るだけ!!
これでみんなもアイドル気分♪
使ってみてね〜🐹
#NanoBananaPro
以外プロンプト（名前指定してね）
↓↓
添付画像の人を使って下さい。
名前は〇〇です。
添付画像に写っている人物の髪型、服装、スタイルを完全に維持したまま、生成された、机の上に置かれた「instax mini（チェキ）」画像。
【フィルム形状の指定】
フィルム全体は縦長の長方形（縦86mm×横54mmの比率）。
写真は白いフレームに囲まれており、上・左・右の枠は細く、下側の枠だけが他よりも広く（約2倍の幅）なっている、instax mini特有のフォーマットを正確に再現する。
画像エリアは縦長（4:3比率）。
【書き込みの指定（添付画像の人物の雰囲気からAIが推測）】
添付画像の人物の雰囲気にマッチする色のマーカーペンで、以下の手書き落書きがされている。
1. 上部の細い余白部分：人物の雰囲気から推測した、日本語の一言メッセージ。
2. 下部の広い余白部分：作成した日付（例2025.11.29）と、本人の流れるような直筆サイン。（この場合は宮田真由美）
3. 写真の画像部分：ハート、星、キラキラ、顔文字などの可愛い落書きが顔を隠さない程度に散りばめられている。
【人物】写真の中身は中央に添付の人物を配置。頭から膝まで映る画角。白い壁の前でアイドルのようなランダムなポーズを決めている（ポーズは人物の雰囲気から推測）直射フラッシュで撮影されたようなハイコントラストで、少し色が飛んだフィルムの質感。
【質感と背景】
写真が置かれた背景は、白い机の上。ナチュラルな影が落ちている。

title: 城市中的反思：在消防梯上的片刻
author: YaseenK7212
prompt: 一名男性模特穿着棕色飞行员夹克和深色裤子，站在消防梯平台的边缘。他的一条腿自然地悬垂着，另一条腿则弯曲着。当他准备踏上楼梯时，他若有所思地望着远方。旁边放着一个印有品牌标志的行李袋。背景是城市街道，灯光柔和。请确保他的面部表情与我上传的原图完全一致，不得有任何修改或模糊处理。
prompt_en: A male model, dressed in a brown bomber jacket, dark trousers, is perched on the edge of a fire escape platform. One leg dangles freely while the other is bent. Should he set on stairs He looks contemplatively into the distance. Monogrammed duffel bag rests nearby. Urban street background, soft ambient lighting Keep the face 100% exact same as I uploaded no alteration, no blurry.

title: 夜街抓拍：烟花下的模糊瞬间
author: zayan
prompt:
超逼真的意外智能手机照片——四格样片。
一张图片包含四个 9:16 的垂直画幅，呈 2x2 网格排列，通过仓促的手持手机连拍捕捉。
主体：完全虚构的成年女性，不可识别。
参考图片仅用于确定大致年龄范围和中性姿态——无相似之处，无面部复制。
由于运动模糊、闪光灯过曝、自动对焦失败和卷帘快门重影，每个画幅的面部细节都部分不可读。
场景：夜间东京人行道，旁边是白色瓷砖建筑，正值烟花表演。
烟花仅以遥远、裁剪、模糊的光条或过曝的光斑形式出现——从不居中，从不欢庆。
相机故障：现代智能手机，仓促手持拍摄。
不可预测的闪光灯主导画面。自动对焦失误。剧烈相机抖动。严重的定向模糊、重影、双重边缘、刺眼的剪切高光、曝光不均、强烈噪点。没有清晰或锐利之处。
画幅序列：
侧身走过，毫无察觉。
突然转头，惊讶，面部因运动而模糊。
手本能地挡住镜头，害羞而克制的微笑，强烈重影。
几乎出画，淡淡的尴尬微笑，极度模糊。
情绪：侵扰、尴尬、转瞬即逝——这些图像本不应存在。
负面提示：动漫、插画、电影烟花、节日气氛、霓虹灯、影棚或美妆灯光、锐利对焦、摆拍、专业相机、面部复制、身份匹配、美颜滤镜、完美对称。
prompt_en:
Ultra-realistic accidental smartphone photograph — quad-frame contact sheet.
Single image with four vertical 9:16 frames in a 2×2 grid, captured in a rushed handheld phone burst.
Subject: completely fictional adult woman, non-identifiable.
Reference image used ONLY for general age range and neutral demeanor — no resemblance, no face copying.
Facial details partially unreadable in every frame due to motion blur, flash overexposure, autofocus failure, and rolling-shutter ghosting.
Scene: nighttime Tokyo sidewalk beside a plain white ceramic tile building during a fireworks event.
Fireworks appear only as distant, cropped, smeared light streaks or blown-out blobs — never centered, never celebratory.
Camera failure: modern smartphone, rushed handheld capture.
Unpredictable flash dominates. Missed autofocus. Extreme camera shake. Heavy directional blur, ghosting, double edges, harsh clipped highlights, uneven exposure, strong noise. Nothing clean or sharp.
Frame sequence:
Walking past side-on, unaware.
Sudden head turn, surprised, face smeared by motion.
Hand reflexively blocking the lens, shy restrained smile, strong ghosting.
Almost out of frame, faint embarrassed smile, extreme blur.
Mood: intrusive, awkward, fleeting — images never meant to exist.
Negative: anime, illustration, cinematic fireworks, festival mood, neon, studio or beauty lighting, sharp focus, posed photography, professional camera, face copy, identity match, beauty filters, perfect symmetry.

title: 3D等距迷你模型预设：现代车库场景与艺术装饰
author: Favori
prompt: 风格化、极其精细的高保真 3D 等距微缩模型，展示了一个现代健身车库，车库内有一辆 {argument name="car model" default="红色保时捷 911"}。车库内设有一个令人惊叹的办公区，配有 1 张办公桌，以及来自 {argument name="artist 1" default="罗斯科"} 和 {argument name="artist 2" default="阿沙姆"} 的精美中世纪现代家具和艺术品。柔和的摄影棚灯光投下淡淡的阴影，高细节的立体模型置于一个简单的矩形底座上，所有背景均为白色。
prompt_en: stylized, extremely detailed high fidelity 3D isometric miniature model of a modern gym garage with a {argument name="car model" default="Red Porsche 911"} inside, a stunning working setup for 1 desks and a beautiful mid-century modern furniture and artwork from {argument name="artist 1" default="Rothko"} and {argument name="artist 2" default="Arsham"}, soft studio lighting with light shadows, high-detail diorama on a simple rectangular base, all white background

title: 长曝光街头人像：静默女子与姜猫在黄昏广场的对比
author: X / Taaruk

title: 飞越夏威夷海滩的畅快体验
author: John
prompt:
场景：夏威夷威基基海滩上空。晴天。
动作：女子以极快的速度向前飞行（超人姿势）。她的头发和衣服在强风中剧烈飘动。她看起来很兴奋，对着镜头大喊。
音频：充满活力的女声在风声中用中文喊道：“兄弟们，我现在可以飞了！想去哪里就去哪里！” 巨大的风声（呼啸声）。
镜头：跟踪镜头 / 推轨前进。镜头以相同的速度跟随她。背景中的城市和海洋迅速向后移动，以显示速度。
prompt_en:
Scene: High altitude above Waikiki Beach, Hawaii. Sunny day.
Action: The woman is flying forward at high speed (Superman pose). Her hair and clothes flap violently in the strong wind. She looks excited and shouts to the camera.
Audio: Energetic female voice shouting in Chinese over the wind noise: "{"Chinese Dialogue" "兄弟们，我现在可以飞了！想去哪里就去哪里！"}" (Xiongdi men, wo xianzai keyi fei le! Xiang qu nali jiu qu nali!). Loud wind rushing sound (Whoosh).
Camera: Tracking Shot / Dolly Forward. The camera follows her at the same speed. The background city and ocean move backwards rapidly to show speed.

title: 将素描人物添加到您的真实照片中
author: @egeberkina
prompt: 在这张照片中添加简洁的白色线条人物插画。插画的视角、光线和比例应与照片中的场景相符。人物应与环境自然而有意义地互动，反映空间的氛围、用途和活动。保持线条简洁流畅、富有表现力，无需添加面部细节。保持现代、温暖且略带奇幻的基调，与整体美感相得益彰。不要遮挡任何原有元素。插画人物应像友好而富有想象力的点缀，与场景环境完美融合。
prompt_en: Add clean, minimal white line-drawing illustrations of people into this photo. Match the perspective, lighting, and scale of the scene. The illustrated figures should interact naturally and meaningfully with the environment, reflecting the mood, purpose, and activity of the space. Keep the drawings simple, fluid, and expressive, with no facial details. Maintain a modern, warm, and slightly whimsical tone that complements the overall aesthetic. Do not obscure any original elements. The illustrated figures should feel like friendly, imaginative additions that blend seamlessly with the context of the scene.

title: Water Margin top 30 characters grid in gongbi style
author: Adrien
prompt: Generate an image of the top 30 characters from "Water Margin" in a grid format, in the style of Chinese gongbi painting, with each character’s name written in the lower‑right corner of their cell.
prompt_en: Generate an image of the top 30 characters from "Water Margin" in a grid format, in the style of Chinese gongbi painting, with each character’s name written in the lower‑right corner of their cell.

title: 超现实的高冲击力的图像
author: @azed_ai
prompt: 创建一个超现实的、高冲击力的图像，展示一个[主题]在空中悬停，捕捉到爆炸性时刻的巅峰。用动态的[粒子/飞溅/碎片]围绕它，增强运动感和能量。宏观细节，大胆的边缘照明，以及充满活力的[背景颜色]，以强调形状、质感和对比度，电影般的、现代的、视觉上引人注目。非常适合高端产品活动。
prompt_en: Create a hyperrealistic, high-impact image of a [subject] suspended mid-air, captured at the peak of an explosive moment. Surround it with dynamic [particles/splashes/fragments] that enhance motion and energy. macro-level detail, bold rim lighting, and a vibrant [background color] to emphasize form, texture, and contrast, cinematic, modern, and visually striking. perfect for premium product campaigns.

title: 地铁车厢内独享30cm迷你空间的通勤场景
author: 岡田泰彦｜光邦｜巻き込まれ型AIエヴァンジェリスト
prompt: 我只是个迷你版，大约 30 厘米高，在火车里。
prompt_en: 電車の中で自分だけ30cmくらいのミニサイズ

title: 生成城市天气预报微缩模型图
author: 宝玉
prompt:
生成特色城市天气预报图片
注：
- 请修改提示词底部的城市、天气、温度
- “城市特色建筑”可以具体写上名称
- 本图用 sora 生成
提示词：
以清晰的45°俯视角度，展示一个等距微缩模型场景，内容为城市特色建筑，天气效果巧妙融入场景中，柔和的天气效果与城市轻柔互动。使用基于物理的真实渲染（PBR）和逼真的光照效果，纯色背景，清晰简洁。画面采用居中构图，凸显出三维模型精准而细腻的美感。在图片上方展示城市名称和当前天气状况，并附有相应的天气图标。
城市：上海
天气：多云
温度：20摄氏度

title: 自然慵懒风女性肖像，石墙背景，白裙轻倚，柔光写真
author: Iris

title: 奢华私房写真：铂金发女郎床榻上的优雅姿态
author: Emma

title: 高端生活产品动态展示图集
author: Skipper
prompt: 3x3 网格产品，采用大胆现代的配色方案，展示了精致的设计、纹理和功能元素，部分与人体或环境（手、腿、运动模糊、抓握或使用场景）互动。场景以深黑色或深色背景为主，具有强烈的高对比度电影级照明和戏剧性高光。水滴、颗粒或大气元素在产品周围凝固，以高速快门捕捉。使用广角镜头和特写视角拍摄，以强调尺寸、力量和材料质量。充满活力的动感能量、夜间氛围、鲜明的点缀、对纹理的清晰聚焦、独特的图案以及高端运动或生活方式美学，传达出速度、力量和强度。
prompt_en: [{"product list" "bottle of olive oil pizza running shoes bottle of red wine burger smartwatch bottle of craft beer chocolate cake headphones sushi platter perfume bottle ice cream cone laptop gourmet steak coffee cup"}] 3x3 grid products with a bold and modern color scheme, showcasing detailed design, textures, and functional elements, partially interacting with the human body or environment (hands, legs, motion blur, grip, or usage context). The scene features a deep black or dark background, with strong high-contrast cinematic lighting and dramatic highlights. Water droplets, particles, or atmospheric elements are frozen in motion around the product, captured with a fast shutter speed. Shot using wide-angle lenses and close-up perspectives to emphasize scale, power, and material quality. Dynamic motion energy, nighttime atmosphere, vibrant accents, sharp focus on textures, unique patterns, and a premium sports or lifestyle aesthetic, conveying speed, strength, and intensity.

title: 超写实美女户外肖像摄影预设
author: Aylin
prompt: 杰作，最佳品质，超写实肖像，描绘一位极其美丽的 21 岁女性，面部特征精致对称，大而富有表现力的淡褐色眼睛，睫毛纤长，脸颊泛着柔和自然的红晕，丰满光泽的嘴唇呈微妙的裸粉色，略带梦幻般的嘟嘴，头部轻柔地倾斜，视线略微偏离镜头，浓密波浪状的栗棕色长发自然地披散在肩上，几缕发丝轻柔地捕捉着光线，皮肤光滑无瑕，带有细微的毛孔和微纹理，身穿紧身白色露脐棉质 T 恤，深 V 甜心领口，薄薄的布料在胸部略微拉伸，中央系着一个大而鲜艳的红色缎带蝴蝶结作为焦点，高腰哑光黑色无缝紧身裤包裹着双腿，随意地坐在风化的木制公园长凳上，双腿随意分开，一只手放在大腿上，城市公园背景，纤细的白色桦树，绿色植物和斑驳的阳光，日落时分，温暖的阳光透过树叶，在头发和皮肤上形成柔和的轮廓光和轻微的高光，电影级调色，带有微妙的青橙色调，浅景深，梦幻般的散景，超逼真，超细节 8k，使用 Sony A1 相机和 85mm f/1.2 镜头拍摄，自然户外光线，胶片颗粒。
prompt_en: masterpiece, best quality, ultra realistic portrait of an extremely beautiful 21-year-old woman, delicate symmetrical facial features, large expressive hazel eyes with long lashes, soft natural rosy flush on cheeks, full glossy lips in subtle nude-pink, slight dreamy pout and gentle head tilt looking slightly off-camera, long voluminous wavy chestnut-brown hair cascading naturally over shoulders with soft flyaways catching light, flawless smooth skin with subtle pores and micro-textures, wearing tight white cropped cotton t-shirt with deep plunging sweetheart neckline, thin fabric slightly stretched over chest, large oversized vibrant red satin bow attached at center as focal accent, high-waisted matte black seamless leggings hugging legs, sitting relaxed on weathered wooden park bench with legs casually apart and one hand resting on thigh, urban park background with slender white birch trees, green foliage and dappled sunlight, golden hour late afternoon warm sunlight filtering through leaves creating soft rim light and gentle highlights on hair and skin, cinematic color grading with subtle teal-orange tones, shallow depth of field, dreamy bokeh, photorealistic, hyperdetailed 8k, shot on Sony A1 with 85mm f/1.2 lens, natural outdoor lighting, film grain,

title: 黑白人猫亲密肖像
author: Jinx
prompt: 这是一幅风格独特的黑白肖像作品，描绘了一位女性将一只黑色猫咪紧贴在脸边的场景。女性的眼睛被清晰地聚焦在画面中，柔和的光线营造出强烈的视觉对比效果。黑色猫咪拥有明亮、反光度高的眼睛和光滑的毛发，其毛发与深色的针织面料融为一体。整幅作品展现出一种亲密、富有情感的艺术风格，细节处理极为精细，阴影效果富有戏剧性，质感柔和，构图采用特写视角。
prompt_en:
Nano Banana Pro
Prompt:
Moody black-and-white portrait of a woman holding a black cat close to her face. The woman’s eye is sharply in focus, with soft light creating a dramatic contrast. The black cat has bright, reflective eyes and smooth fur, blending into the dark knitted fabric. Intimate, emotional, artistic photography style, high detail, dramatic shadows, soft texture, close-up composition.

title: 一张超写实的电影海报
author: @iamsofiaijaz
prompt:
一张超写实的电影海报，描绘了一位强大的女巫，她的面部结构和外貌与上传的参考照片相同，她正从一张破裂的黑桃皇后扑克牌中破壳而出。
卡片向外爆炸，石块碎片、尘埃和碎片在半空中凝固。
她身穿一件华丽的皇家酒红色和金色刺绣中世纪奇幻外套，面料质感丰富，细节精致，尽显高贵神秘之感。女巫向前伸出一只手，手指闪耀着强烈的魔法能量，隐隐的金色火花和黑暗的奥术光环环绕着她的手。
目光锐利，神态自信霸气，电影英雄般的构图。
戏剧性的明暗对比照明，阴暗的背景，立体光线，超精细的纹理，浅景深的电影效果。
照片级逼真的面部、史诗般的奇幻写实主义、电影海报构图、高对比度、动态效果、灰尘颗粒、杰作品质、超清晰对焦、8K分辨率、电影级色彩分级。
prompt_en:
A hyper-realistic cinematic movie poster of a powerful female sorcerer with the same facial structure and likeness as the uploaded reference photo, bursting through a cracked Queen of Spades playing card.
The card explodes outward with stone fragments, dust, and debris frozen mid-air.
She wears an ornate royal maroon and gold embroidered medieval fantasy jacket, rich fabric textures, intricate detailing, regal and mystical.The sorcerer extends one hand forward toward the viewer, fingers glowing with intense magical energy, subtle golden sparks and dark arcane aura surrounding the hand.
Intense piercing gaze, confident and dominant expression, cinematic hero framing.
Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, dark moody background, volumetric light rays, ultra-detailed textures, shallow cinematic depth of field.
Photorealistic face, epic fantasy realism, movie poster composition, high contrast, dynamic motion, dust particles, masterpiece quality, ultra-sharp focus, 8K resolution, cinematic color grading.

title: 城市冰箱贴
author: @songguoxiansen
prompt: A clear, directly top-down photograph of shanghai landmarks as realistic miniature 3D magnets, arranged neatly in parallel lines and right angles, knolling on a neutral surface. At the top-center, place a souvenir magnet displaying the city name written in Chinese characters, and a handwritten post-it note also written in Chinese characters showing the current temperature and weather conditions. Incorporate realistic miniature items necessary for today's weather into the knolling arrangement. No repeats of any object. Aspect ratio 1:1.
prompt_en: A clear, directly top-down photograph of shanghai landmarks as realistic miniature 3D magnets, arranged neatly in parallel lines and right angles, knolling on a neutral surface. At the top-center, place a souvenir magnet displaying the city name written in Chinese characters, and a handwritten post-it note also written in Chinese characters showing the current temperature and weather conditions. Incorporate realistic miniature items necessary for today's weather into the knolling arrangement. No repeats of any object. Aspect ratio 1:1.

title: 极光雪景下的忧郁少女三联画：超写实数字艺术呈现
author: X / Yaseen Khan Gul
prompt:
提示词：2160x3840 像素 （4K） 超写实数码照片杰作三联画。该图像是一块垂直画布，分为三个相等的水平面板。主角的脸必须与参考照片 100% 相同，是一位年轻女子，长发飘逸，表情扁平、怀旧，拥有深邃而聪明的眼睛。她的穿搭是宽松的冬季黑色羽绒服套装，搭配宽腿裤和黑色围巾。整体情绪是忧郁和孤独的，背景是白雪覆盖的白色景观和柔和的调色板。
面板 1（人像镜头）：手持透明雨伞的角色，静静地回头看，直视温暖的火光。背景严重模糊（散景），以松树、强烈的北极光和深白雪为特色。
第 2 组（全身镜头）：从高处俯视的摄像机角度拍摄的全身镜头。这个角色独自站在一片广阔、开阔的雪原上，雪原上散落着松树和几棵光秃秃的、没有叶子的树。她撑着伞，一边走着，一边仰望着充满极光的天空，一只手举起，仿佛捕捉着远处飘落的雪花。这个场景传达了与浩瀚自然相映成趣的渺小和孤立。
第 3 幅（特写镜头）：角色面部的紧密特写，以平坦、遥远的目光为特色，唤起孤独和渴望的感觉。背景包括松树、柔和的极光和可见的降雪。
技术规格：使用哈苏 X2D 100C 相机和 Fujifilm GF 45mm f/2.8 R WR 镜头拍摄（以保持所有视角的质量）。使用柔和、昏暗的夜间照明，与面板 1 中的火形成温暖的对比。专注于有纹理的羽绒面料、柔软的雪和极光的发光品质。电影色彩，强调冷色调和忧郁气氛。
面部约束：关键：使用所附照片作为主题参考。保持 100% 相同的面部特征：不要改变源照片中的眼睛、头发、鼻子、嘴唇、前刘海和脸型的外观。必须在所有三个面板中完美保留标识。
prompt_en:
Prompt: A 2160x3840 pixel (4K) Ultra-Realistic Digital Photo Masterpiece Triptych. The image is a vertical canvas divided into three equal horizontal panels. The main subject, whose face must be 100% identical to the reference photo, is a young woman with long, flowing hair and a flat, nostalgic expression, possessing deep, intelligent eyes. Her outfit is a loose winter black puffer set with wide-cut trousers and a black scarf. The overall mood is melancholy and solitude, set in a snow-covered white landscape with a muted color palette.
Panel 1 (Portrait Shot): A medium portrait of the character holding a transparent umbrella, silently looking back while gazing directly into the warm glow of a fire. The background is heavily blurred (bokeh), featuring pine trees, a strong aurora borealis, and deep white snow.
Panel 2 (Full Body Shot): A full-body shot captured from a high, looking-down camera angle. The character stands alone in a vast, open snowfield with scattered pine trees and a few bare, leafless trees. She holds the umbrella, walking while gazing up at the aurora-filled sky, with one hand raised as if catching falling snowflakes in the distance. The scene conveys smallness and isolation against the vastness of nature.
Panel 3 (Close Up Shot): A tight close-up of the character's face, featuring a flat, distant gaze that evokes feelings of loneliness and longing. The background includes pine trees, the soft aurora glow, and visible snowfall.
Technical Specifications: Captured with a Hasselblad X2D 100C camera and a Fujifilm GF 45mm f/2.8 R WR lens (to maintain quality across all perspectives). Soft, dim night lighting is used, with warm contrast from the fire in Panel 1. Focus on the textured puffer material, the soft snow, and the luminous quality of the aurora. Cinematic coloring with a strong emphasis on cold tones and melancholy atmosphere.
Facial Constraint: Crucial: Use the attached photo as the subject reference. Maintain 100% identical facial features: do not alter the appearance of the eyes, hair, nose, lips, front bangs, and face shape from the source photo. The identity must be perfectly preserved across all three panels.

Wide angles, sharp shadows, clean lines.

title: 分子料理元素周期表展示
author: Gadgetify
prompt:
为 [您的餐点] 执行此操作
为 {"food item" "菠萝披萨"} 执行此操作
<instruction>
输入 A 是一种复杂的食物。
分析：将食物分解成原始食材，并为每种食材分配一个“元素周期表”式的缩写（例如，To、Li、On）。
目标：一个“分子美食学”亚克力展示盒，背景为纯黑色。
规则：
布局：根据食材数量确定布局，始终向上取整为正方形或长方形，透明亚克力网格盒。
中心槽：中心方格不是透明的；它是一张哑光黑色卡片，上面印有输入 A 的白色技术爆炸图/线框图，标有“[{"food name" "食物名称"}] 组装分子”。
周围槽：外围槽中包含新鲜的原始食材（玉米饼、青柠角、切碎的洋葱、肉）。
排版：每个隔间的前玻璃上印有大型白色“元素周期表”式字体（符号 + 名称），漂浮在食材上方。
人物：一个身穿实验服的 1:12 比例微型科学家站在盒子前的桌面上，与微型版输入 A 互动。
灯光与氛围：深色模式美学。鲜明对比的灯光，纯黑色背景，亚克力边缘有锐利的反光。
输出：一张图片，1:1 比例，微距摄影，8k 分辨率。
</instruction>
prompt_en:
Do this for [your meal]
Do this for {"food item" "pineapple pizza"}
<instruction>
Input A is a complex food item.
Analyze: Break the item down into raw ingredients and assign each a "Periodic Table" style abbreviation (e.g., To, Li, On).
Goal: A "Molecular Gastronomy" acrylic display box set against a void black background.
Rules:
Layout: determine layout based on # of ingredients, always round up to square or rectangle, clear acrylic grid box.
Center Slot: The center square is NOT clear; it is a matte black card featuring a white technical exploded view blueprint/wireframe of Input A labeled "[{"food name" "food name"}] Assembly Molecule."
Surrounding Slots: The outer slots contain the fresh, raw ingredients (tortillas, lime wedges, chopped onions, meat).
Typography: Large white "Periodic Table" style lettering (Symbol + Name) printed on the front glass of each compartment, floating over the ingredients.
Figure: A 1:12 scale miniature scientist in a lab coat standing on the table surface in front of the box, interacting with a miniature version of Input A.
Lighting & Atmosphere: Dark Mode aesthetic. Stark contrast lighting, pure black background, sharp reflections on the acrylic edges.
Output: ONE image, 1:1, macro photography, 8k resolution.
</instruction>

title: 一组由四幅画面组成的精美照片拼贴
author: @_MehdiSharifi_
prompt:
一组由四幅画面组成的精美照片拼贴，以 2x2 的网格排列，展现了同一位年轻女子在阳光明媚的卧室里对着镜子拍摄的温馨私密的自拍照。所有画面中人物形象（同一张脸，凌乱的发髻，身穿宽松的米色针织衫和短裤）和光线都必须保持一致。

1. 左上角（高角度自拍）：一张近距离的高角度镜前自拍，她站在镜子前，手机向下倾斜。她仰头看着屏幕，睁着大大的眼睛，表情可爱。这个角度突出了她的脸部和毛衣领口的纹理。

2. 右上角画面（床上肖像）：一张私密的特写，她仰卧在床上，头枕在蓬松的白色枕头上。她正对着床边衣柜的镜子欣赏自己的倒影。镜头从胸部以上拍摄，重点展现她放松的表情和散落在枕头上的头发。

3. 左下角面板（远景全身/脚部视角）：一张广角反射照片，拍摄于房间另一侧的落地镜中。她俯卧在床上，举着手机。视角突出了她穿着可爱羊毛袜的双腿和双脚，上半身则在远处的床上可见。

4. 右下角画面（书本遮脸）：她盘腿坐在床上或地板上，面前是镜子，手里拿着一本精美的平装书，遮住了脸。手机捕捉到了这一刻，镜头聚焦在书的封面、她的双手和她舒适的穿着上。

风格与氛围：柔和的晨光，“慵懒的周日”美学，中性色调（奶油色、白色、米色），逼真的8K分辨率，清晰的细节，真实的生活摄影氛围。纤细的白色边框分隔各个画面。
prompt_en:
A cohesive 4-panel aesthetic photo collage arranged in a 2x2 grid, capturing a cozy and intimate mirror selfie photoshoot of the same young woman in her sun-drenched bedroom. The character consistency (same face, messy bun hairstyle, wearing an oversized beige knitted sweater and shorts) and lighting consistency must be perfect across all frames:

1. Top Left Panel (High Angle Selfie): A close-up high-angle mirror selfie where she is standing close to the mirror, tilting her phone downwards. She looks up at the screen with big eyes and a cute expression. The angle emphasizes her face and the texture of her sweater neckline.

2. Top Right Panel (Bed Portrait): An intimate shot where she is lying on her back on the bed, her head sinking into a fluffy white pillow. She is capturing her reflection in a wardrobe mirror next to the bed. The framing is from the chest up, focusing on her relaxed expression and hair spread out on the pillow.

3. Bottom Left Panel (Distant Full Body/Feet View): A wide-angle reflection shot captured in a floor mirror across the room. She is lying on the bed on her stomach, holding the phone up. The perspective highlights her legs and feet (wearing cute wool socks) in the foreground, with her upper body visible in the distance on the bed.

4. Bottom Right Panel (Book Face Cover): She is sitting cross-legged on the bed or floor in front of the mirror, holding an aesthetic paperback book directly in front of her face to hide it. The phone captures this moment, focusing on the book cover, her hands, and her cozy outfit.

Style & Atmosphere: Soft morning sunlight, "lazy Sunday" aesthetic, neutral color palette (creams, whites, beige), photorealistic 8k resolution, sharp details, genuine lifestyle photography vibe. Thin white borders separating the panels.

title: 墨染幻境，形神俱现
author: Aleena Amir
prompt: {"subject" "SUBJECT"} 在牛奶般的水中，从旋转的墨迹中缓缓浮现。浓郁的黑色与浑浊的白色交织融合，柔和的扩散，流畅的动态，抽象却又可辨的形态。梦幻般的氛围，诗意的极简主义，微距摄影风格，细节丰富。
prompt_en: The {"subject" "SUBJECT"} slowly emerges from swirling ink suspended in milky water. Rich blacks blend with cloudy whites, soft diffusion, fluid motion, abstract yet recognizable form. Dreamlike atmosphere, poetic minimalism, macro photography style, high detail.
